product: Run read-only queries on Lakebase (Provisioned) readable secondaries from SQL…
tagline: You can now connect to Lakebase (Provisioned) readable secondaries and run read only queries from the Databricks SQL editor.
what_it_does: You can now connect to Lakebase (Provisioned) readable secondaries and run read only queries from the Databricks SQL editor. info Lakebase Provisioned is the original Lakebase offering that uses provisioned compute you scale manually. For supported regions, see Region availability.
why_it_matters: info Lakebase Provisioned is the original Lakebase offering that uses provisioned compute you scale manually.
plain_summary: You can now connect to Lakebase (Provisioned) readable secondaries and run read only queries from the Databricks SQL editor. info Lakebase Provisioned is the original Lakebase offering that uses provisioned compute you scale manually.
key_takeaway: You can now connect to Lakebase (Provisioned) readable secondaries and run read only queries from the Databricks SQL editor.
